title: TY44
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=TY44 |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square R-5 in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian Borderlands]]. |sector=[[Sertar sector/Legends|Sertar sector]] |system=[[Uziel system]] |coordinates=R-5 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited=[[Typha-Dor]] |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=Ice, Snow |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] }} {{Quote|We are Jedi, sent by Typha-Dor ... You must be Shalini."
"So our leaders have remembered we exist..."
"But where are the rest? There are supposed to be ten of you."
"Not anymore ... We had a saboteur in our midst.|Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi and Shalini, crew leader of the TY44 outpost|''[[Jedi Quest: The Moment of Truth]]''}} '''TY44''' was the name of one of a "string" of [[Satellite/Legends|satellite]]-[[moon]]s orbiting the planet [[Typha-Dor]], located in the [[Uziel system]]. Named for its coordinates, TY44 had a very icy terrain and its surface was covered with glaciers. By [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], a surveillance outpost of [[Typha-Dor]] was located on this moon. Several of its resistance fighter-crew members were eliminated by the would-be invaders of their home planet, expansionist forces from [[Vanqor/Legends|Vanqor]] who sent in a [[Mezdec|saboteur]] to infiltrate the crew's operations and assassinate its members. In 25 BBY, [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were [[Mission to Typha-Dor|sent to rescue]] the outpost's surviving crew members by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] at the request of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. {{Moon-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi Quest: The Moment of Truth]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|multiple}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=TY44 |it=TY44 }} [[Category:Galactic Republic moons]] [[Category:Ice moons]] [[Category:Moons in the Outer Rim Territories]] [[Category:Moons in the Trans-Hydian Borderlands]] [[Category:Uziel system locations]]
